column1: # Clustara GPU Operations collector set for NVIDIA DCGM Exporter.
# Mount as /etc/dcgm-exporter/clustara-counters.csv and start dcgm-exporter with
# -f /etc/dcgm-exporter/clustara-counters.csv -k so Pod/Namespace/Container and MIG labels are exposed.
# Profiling fields may be multiplexed by DCGM when the device cannot watch all fields concurrently.

column3: Ratio of cycles with an active warp.
Ratio of cycles with the tensor pipe active.
